summary: Strong week for actionable intelligence: HEC professor Thierry Warin published Gulf sovereign wealth fund analysis (direct EMJ Connection), Quebec SEAO has AI consulting RFP closing March 3, IVADO launches 2025 industry partnership program. Moov AI's STM win reveals public sector procurement playbook. US quant funds ramping AI hiring - OpenAI stealing talent. Three Montreal professors actively seeking industry collaborators this week.

highlights.title: Quebec SEAO RFP: AI Consulting Services
highlights.summary: SAAQ (Quebec auto insurance) seeking AI consulting for claims processing. $250K-500K range. Deadline March 3. Must be registered in Quebec.
highlights.relevance: Action: Register on SEAO, review RFP, decide bid by Friday
highlights.action: Register on SEAO today, download RFP specs

highlights.summary: Prof Warin's new paper maps how Saudi/UAE sovereign funds deploy AI capital. Direct relevance to EMJ Capital positioning.
highlights.relevance: Action: Email Warin for coffee, discuss Gulf positioning

highlights.title: Moov AI STM Win - Procurement Playbook
highlights.summary: Moov won STM Orange Line ML contract. Key insight: 'mentoring-heavy model' with knowledge transfer requirements. Replicable approach.
highlights.relevance: Action: Study proposal structure, apply to similar RFPs
highlights.action: Request STM RFP docs through contacts

tech_research.title: Time-Series Anomaly Detection at Scale
tech_research.summary: AWS team publishes production system for real-time financial anomaly detection. Handles 1M+ metrics/sec. Open source.
tech_research.action: Clone repo, test on sample data

tech_research.title: Jailbreak Detection via Attention Patterns
tech_research.summary: New technique detects adversarial prompts by analyzing attention head divergence. 89% accuracy, no training required.
tech_research.relevance: Bastion: Add to CTF detection toolkit

tech_research.title: LLM Quantization for Edge Deployment
tech_research.summary: Microsoft Research releases bitnet.cpp — run 3B parameter models on Raspberry Pi. 10x speedup vs naive quantization.
tech_research.action: Test bitnet.cpp for voice model edge deployment
